Score the article against the full quality rubric:

Readability (40%)
Technical accuracy (35%)
Clarity (25%)

Threshold: 9.0/10 composite.

If the composite score is below 9.0, identify every criterion scoring below 9.0 and revise the article comprehensively to address each weakness. Re-score the revised article. Repeat this loop until the composite score reaches 9.0 or above.
